scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @hyveon/desktop-main" "npm run dev -w @hyveon/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @hyveon/shared && npm run build -w @hyveon/desktop-main && npm run build -w @hyveon/web
scripts.build:lambdas: npm run build -w @hyveon/shared && npm run build -w @hyveon/lambda-interactions -w @hyveon/lambda-followup -w @hyveon/lambda-update-dns -w @hyveon/lambda-watchdog -w @hyveon/lambda-efs-seeder
